title: Visibility toggle
description: Allows you to toggle the visibility of itemframes specifically placed by you.
body:
This datapack simply allows you to toggle the visibility of an itemframe that you have placed by using the command:
```
/trigger visibility
```

### Installation
**If you get a message saying the pack is not supported in lower versions I have marked it as working in, ignore this as it will still work**

**Datapack installation:**  
1. Locate the datapack folder for the specific world  
2. Drag the Itemframes.zip file into the datapack folder  
3. Enable the datapack with /datapack enable "file/Itemframes.zip"  

**Mod installation:**  
1. Follow the instructions on how to install your prefered modloader (be it Forge, Fabric, NeoForge or Quilt)
2. Drag the downloaded .jar file into (on windows) %appdata%\.minecraft\mods
3. Launch the world and start playing

**Please report any problems on my discord server.**
